keywords.job: I am Thais's foremost furniture salesman.
keywords.news: You mean my specials, don't you?
keywords.how: Excellent! Never felt better in my life!
keywords.are: Excellent! Never felt better in my life!
keywords.you: I sell statues, tables, chairs, flowers, pillows, pottery, instruments, decoration, tapestries and containers.
keywords.name: My friends call me Gamon. My fans call me the incredible Gammy!
keywords.time: Any time's a good time to buy some furniture.
keywords.Thais: Thais is obsessed with its past. Everybody here is so proud of their history. Bah! Thais might have a long history, but it has no idea when it comes to interior decoration.
keywords.Venore: The place where it all happens. That town really rocks! Thais could learn a lot about interior decoration from Venore!
keywords.power: There are a few rumours about a rebellion, but that is all they are.
keywords.rebellion: Well - a few paranoid souls think that Venore wants to gain independence from Thais. Nothing more than rumours.
keywords.quality: Our furniture is produced by the finest carpenters on the continent using the rare wood of the Venorean marsh willow!
keywords.marsh: You can't get any better wood in this world. And it has got a nice smell to it, too. There is nothing nicer than a marsh willow campfire.
keywords.willow: You can't get any better wood in this world. And it has got a nice smell to it, too. There is nothing nicer than a marsh willow campfire.
keywords.king: His Royal Highness will start to appreciate the superior quality of our stock soon enough!
keywords.sam: I heard rumours he has some special offers for customers who know to ask for the correct things.
keywords.benjamin: He's incredibly slow. Just your average postman, I guess.
keywords.gorn: He sells stuff of inferior quality. Nothing compared to venores high quality goods.
keywords.quentin: That old monk has probably never left that overcrowded town here.
keywords.quest: A quest?! Who needs quests when there is interior decorating!
keywords.bozo: Bozo! Damn that clown! He keeps making fake orders. It isn't funny to deliver a wardrobe to an address that doesn't even exist, you know!
keywords.tibia: Tibia is a wonderful place full of business opportunities.
keywords.castle: I've said it a thousand times! That place needs a complete refurbishing!
keywords.muriel: The sorcerers guild could realy need someone with taste to redecorate it.
keywords.elane: She's pretty, but I am the kind of man who enjoys a long and healthy life.
keywords.marvik: Druids are obsessed with trees and the bane of any carpenter.
keywords.gregor: Those knights know how to party. And after such partys theres allways need for new furniture.
keywords.guild: Now those people really talk business. There is a new era dawning.
keywords.merchants: Now those people really talk business. There is a new era dawning.
keywords.Topsy: Ah, those twins. Strange people they are (*sigh*). Oh, they are great to work with, of course. Excellent quality, competetive prices! But well... (whispers) they give me the creeps!
keywords.Turvy: Ah, those twins. Strange people they are (*sigh*). Oh, they are great to work with, of course. Excellent quality, competetive prices! But well... (whispers) they give me the creeps!
keywords.twins: Ah, those twins. Strange people they are (*sigh*). Oh, they are great to work with, of course. Excellent quality, competetive prices! But well... (whispers) they give me the creeps!
keywords.creeps: Yes! I can never figure out which is which. And they are always watching me!
keywords.watching: Look! They are doing it again! And they are always smiling!
keywords.smiling: Yes! Smiling! How a professional sales artist such as myself is supposed to work in such an atmosphere is beyond me!
keywords.artist: Yes! Selling is a form of art! The elaborate combination of rhetoric and acting which serves to create a sublime longing for the infinite, embodied by second class furniture.
keywords.rug: Oh, silly me! Rugs are out of stock at the moment! But we expect a new shipment anytime. Just watch out for the next update!... Of our inventory I mean.
keywords.offer: I sell statues, tables, chairs, flowers, pillows, pottery, instruments, decoration, tapestries and containers.
keywords.goods: I sell statues, tables, chairs, flowers, pillows, pottery, instruments, decoration, tapestries and containers.
keywords.do: I sell statues, tables, chairs, flowers, pillows, pottery, instruments, decoration, tapestries and containers.
keywords.sell: I sell statues, tables, chairs, flowers, pillows, pottery, instruments, decoration, tapestries and containers.
keywords.have: I sell statues, tables, chairs, flowers, pillows, pottery, instruments, decoration, tapestries and containers.
keywords.furniture: I sell statues, tables, chairs, flowers, pillows, pottery, instruments, decoration, tapestries and containers.
keywords.equipment: I sell statues, tables, chairs, flowers, pillows, pottery, instruments, decoration, tapestries and containers.
keywords.special: My offers are permanently extraordinarily cheap.
keywords.statue: What statue would you like? A knights statue, a minotaur statue or a goblin statue?
keywords.table: Do you want to buy a small table, a round table, a square table or a big table?
keywords.red: Do you want to buy a small table, a round table, a square table or a big table?
keywords.chair: I can offer you a red cushioned chair or a green cushioned chair.
keywords.green: Do you want to buy a small table, a round table, a square table or a big table?
keywords.cushioned: I can offer you a red cushioned chair or a green cushioned chair.
keywords.flower: I offer indoor plants, flower bowls, god flowers, honey flowers and potted flowers. What do you need?
keywords.plant: I offer indoor plants, flower bowls, god flowers, honey flowers and potted flowers. What do you need?
keywords.pillow: What color would you prefer? Red, green, blue or yellow?
keywords.small: What color would you prefer? Purple, green, red, blue, orange, turquoise or white?
keywords.round: What color would you prefer? Purple, red, blue or turquoise?
keywords.square: What color would you prefer? Red, green, blue or yellow?
keywords.pottery: I offer vases, coal basins, amphora and large amphora. What do you need?
keywords.instruments: I can offer you a piano or a harp. What would you like?
keywords.decoration: I can offer water pipes, pendulum clock, telescopes, table lamps, rocking horses, globes and birdcages. I also sell wall hangings.
keywords.wall: I can offer mirrors, paintings and cuckoo clocks.
keywords.hangings: I can offer mirrors, paintings and cuckoo clocks.
keywords.painting: Would you like a landscape, a portrait or a still life. What is your choice?
keywords.mirror: I sell round mirrors, oval mirrors and edged mirrors. Which one might it be?
keywords.curtain: Well, actually it's better to call them tapestries.
keywords.tapestr: Please tell me what color you would prefer: purple, green, yellow, orange, red, blue or white?
keywords.containers: I offer drawers, dressers, lockers, crates, chests, boxes, barrels, trunks and troughs.

texts: Well, hello there, Lady, welcome to Gamon's humble furniture shop!
Nice to meet you, Mister ! Looking for furniture? You've come to the right place!
I am Thais's foremost furniture salesman.

greetingPatterns.response: Well, hello there, Lady, %N welcome to Gamon's humble furniture shop!
Nice to meet you, Mister %N! Looking for furniture? You've come to the right place!

entries.response: Here you are.
I'm sorry, but you need a premium account if you want to buy furniture.
Come back, when you have enough money.
Hmm, but I'm sure, it would fit nicely into your house.
